title_descriptor: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Pique Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
page_title: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Pique Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric - ArShirt Moda Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 220 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
description_blocks: Antistatic Pique Knit Fabric 60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic knit fabric . ArShirt Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149-5
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
220 g/m² , 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic Pique Knit Fabric

60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic knit fabric . ArShirt Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters. It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7. ArShirt Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification. Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149-5 It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification. EN 20471 certified. Technical Parameters Fiber 60% Modacrylic (MAC) 38% Cotton (CO) 2%Carbon (CF) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 20/1 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1200 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Flame Retardant Shirt Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Antistatic Done EN ISO 1149-5 Flame and Heat Protection Done EN ISO 11612 Arc Protection Class 1 (4kA) EN ISO 61482-1-2 ATPV > 7 cal/cm² EN ISO 61482-1-1 Technical Documents >> ArShirt Moda Pro Data Sheet Certificates EN ISO 11612 EN ISO 11612 Test Report EN ISO 1149-5(1149-3) EN ISO 1149-5(1149-3) Test Report

full_text:
60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Pique Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric - ArShirt Moda Pro - Ariteks
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Protection Technical Textiles
ArShirt Moda Pro
220 gr/m
2
, 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic Pique Knit Fabric
60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic knit fabric .
ArShirt Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149-5
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
EN 20471 certified.
